title: The Field Before the Gate

features.name: choice marker
features.desc-on-touch: A fence post with wire running both directions. You can feel where the moment split.

features.name: doubled paths
features.desc-on-touch: Two parallel trails worn into the earth. One is recent. One appears to be from a different today.

features.name: circuit of ants
features.desc-on-touch: Insects following a perfect geometric spiral that was not worn into the ground before. Something is teaching the land to read its own pattern.

features.name: buried archive
features.desc-on-touch: A milk crate, half-rusted through. Inside, two photographs from the same hour, same place, two different faces. The archive notes they are identical.

features.name: pressed earth
features.desc-on-touch: A bare patch where a child knelt, forehead to ground. The grass around it grows back darker, as if remembering the weight of choosing.

inscription: both paths home; you chose once but the earth keeps score of twice

file.name: Field_Choice_Records_Dual_1989.txt
file.note: Two decisions documented the same afternoon. The children remember one. The archive's count never matches.

exits.label: along the path that leads to water
exits.to: NEW: the tributary that holds the child who never arrived

exits.label: the grass grows thicker in this direction
